summary: Prolonged courtship structure building anticipation through escalating gift-giving and poetry exchange, reaching consummation peak before catastrophic collapse via external intervention deus ex machina that punishes both participants and exposes transgression

Dream-sequence revelation mechanism where supernatural bureaucracy operates through visions to deliver moral justice, reward virtue, and expose hidden corruption; second-story funeral control motif recontextualizes preceding virtue narrative

Multi-episode structure demonstrating exceptional skills through 3-5 distinct unrelated adventures, each establishing moral code through contrasting cases (villainous wealthy versus deserving poor); wager system creates investment; impossible escape followed by clever improvisation provides tension-release pattern

summary: False accusation forced by criminal's knowledge of real culprit, enabling protagonist vindication; rival transforms to informant through intercepted conversation revelation; double payment scene asserts dominance and clears name; authority accepts situation through challenge-acceptance-success arc
promotion_target: Frame-narrative resolution structures with false accusation plots

summary: Dramatic appendix serving as meta-commentary beyond story resolution; theatrical framing converges disparate narrative threads; irony of criminal providing justice where official systems failed; character completion through deliberate non-use of skills

Mediating character positioned between transgressive parties, creating plot complications when loyalties conflict; information control links seduction arc to investigation arc; functional role reusable across different character instantiations
